summary: Markets exhibit caution ahead of the Federal Reserve interest rate decision on April 29, with cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin showing strength near $93,500 while precious metals and crypto face moderate downside pressure. Commodities display mixed signals, with oil and natural gas elevated due to geopolitical disruptions but crude facing sell recommendations. Overall sentiment is neutral to bearish in traditional markets amid heightened volatility expectations.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Bitcoin trades near $93,500, far above the $66K April 28 target, with prediction market pricing YES at 99.3%.[2]
